headline: Forget Spaceships—Here’s how SpaceX Became the most Valuable Telecom Company in the World
summary: Investors are focused on AI, but telecom companies might be the ones most at risk from a SpaceX IPO.

headline: TransDigm Second Quarter Earnings Report and Conference Call Set for Tuesday, May 5, 2026
summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG) today said it will report fiscal 2026 second quarter earnings before the market opens on Tuesday, May 5, 2026.
